generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LXPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor actuation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom KalmanFilterModel
]

instance ACCCommandDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ACCControlEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ACCControlData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ACC control logic data per ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCCommandDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering using DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Object tracking via Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring and storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D environment visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Vehicle performance report generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data monitoring for real-time display, saving, and reporting vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for ACC system executed remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffloadInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC system including enable/disable, set desired speed, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle environment and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation for vehicle performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceReportInsight
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical vehicle state data reports"
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Remote execution of ACC system computation"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle surroundings and object tracks"
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational performance reports for vehicle"
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService, RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and model implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService, RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) from DT to PT, converted to motor voltage commands and steering signals via Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of ≤100 ms as per 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC), User Entity (visualization, control), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation); components communicate via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for experimentation and validation, and during operation phase for monitoring and control; covers 'as operated' representation of the physical vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation handles serialization, message type alignment, unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms, clock sync ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and Jetson NX; Digital Twin Entity components deployed on cloud for data storage and computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ACC implementation per ISO 15622 standard; clock synchronization and latency requirements aligned with 3GPP 22.185."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system adhering to ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; maintaining ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization for real-time safety; no explicit cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
